page: Microsoft Azure M32ms_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv2 family. This virtual machine runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and features 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors. It is equipped with 875.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 27.34 GB per vCPU.

The instance does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the hardware is premium storage capable. There are zero integrated graphics processing units and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this configuration.

Given the high density of memory relative to compute resources, this server is designed for memory-intensive workloads rather than raw compute-bound or parallel graphics processing. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for large in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data caching layers that require massive RAM capacity without the overhead of additional vCPUs.
description: Microsoft Azure M32ms_v2 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSMediumMemoryv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 875.0 GB of system memory, providing a high resource density of 27.34 GB of RAM per core. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is premium storage capable, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large-scale in-memory databases, data analytics, and massive caching layers, where RAM capacity is the primary constraint.
